label: Programs & Offerings
extractionGuidance: Courses, workshops, retreats, certificates, student and community programming. Capture program names, audiences (students/faculty/public), formats, and cadence.

label: Research & Scholarship
extractionGuidance: Research areas, labs, named faculty/scholars, notable publications, grants, and partnerships. Capture the topical focus and the apparent scale of output.

label: Messaging & Positioning
extractionGuidance: Mission and vision language, how the center frames contemplative work, its stated values, tone, and intended audience. Capture representative phrases verbatim where useful.
